gpt55_review_summary: Initial GPT-5.5 review found validate-json wrapper hooks skipped evaluate_pr_evidence_record and empty validation summaries could report ok. I added the hook, made empty summaries fail, added regressions, reran focused/full tests and build, and re-review returned clean.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_pr_evidence.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review found wrapper-hook and empty-summary findings; both fixed and re-review returned clean
what_changed: Added validation mode to document-kv-pr-evidence for PR sidecar files and directories.
Added a document_kv.pr_evidence_validation.v1 summary record with per-file PR evidence records.
Preserved document wrapper hook compatibility for validation helpers.
why: Operators and CI need a direct command to validate PR evidence sidecars before attaching them to release bundles or review packages.
